title: Wema Bank Celebrates A Remarkable Journey of 79 Years With Customers - FinancialEDGE
description: It is with immense gratitude that we celebrate Wema Bank's remarkable journey of 79 years of excellence with you by our side. Our evolution from being Nigeria's oldest indigenous bank to being at the forefront of innovation, pioneering Africa's first fully digital bank, ALAT, has been a true story of resilience and transformation.
html:
It is with immense gratitude that we celebrate Wema Bank’s remarkable journey of 79 years of excellence with you by our side.

 

Our evolution from being Nigeria’s oldest indigenous bank to being at the forefront of innovation, pioneering Africa’s first fully digital bank, ALAT, has been a true story of resilience and transformation. At 79, we stand stronger than ever, and this achievement would not have been possible without your support.

 

Thank you for believing in the Wema vision, for entrusting your financial security to us, and for allowing us to contribute to your personal and professional aspirations. Your faith in us is deeply cherished, and we are honored to serve you.

 

As we mark our 79th year, we reaffirm our commitment to empowering lives through innovation, and exceeding your expectations with unparalleled banking experiences tailored to your needs. Our pledge is to stand by you through every stage of life, offering enabling platforms to accelerate your growth and propel you to extraordinary heights.

 

While the past 79 years have been remarkable, we anticipate that the coming decades will be even more inspiring! With your partnership, Wema Bank is poised to set new standards in financial services and redefine the future.

 

Let us celebrate the past, cherish the present, and envision a future filled with shared success and prosperity.

 

We are committed to being with you all the way.

 

Warm regards,

 

Moruf Oseni,

Managing Director/CEO, Wema Bank.
